chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1195 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.2819/2022 (R/Surety) 27-07-2022 Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate for the applicant / surety. M/s Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Soomro and Bahawal-ud-Din Shaikh, Special Prosecutors NAB..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This is an application for return of surety. Special Prosecutor NAB pointed out that notice was issued to the surety under Section 514, Cr.P.C. vide order dated 03-12-2019 as accused Muhammad Saleem Sahito could not appear before this Court on the said date, and instant petition was dismissed on account of non-prosecution by recalling his interim pre-arrest bail. It appears that after such dismissal, he surrendered before the Court and obtained interim pre-arrest bail in C. P. No. D-1830 of 2019 vide order dated 18-12-2019. The surety has furnished his reply to the notice issued to him. After hearing Special Prosecutor NAB, said notice issued to the surety namely Khalid Saifullah under Section 514, Cr.P.C. is vacated. So far the request for return of the surety document, which was furnished by the surety at the time of grant of first pre-arrest bail, is concerned, it appears that surety was furnished by applicant / surety Khalid Saifullah in the shape of Solvency Certificate No.48 dated 16-09-2016 issued by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Naushahro Feroze, at Circuit Court, Hyderabad in terms of the order dated 25-08-2016 because accused Muhammad Saleem Sahito was granted interim pre- arrest bail at Circuit Court, Hyderabad in the sum of Rs.500,000/- (Rupees

After hearing Special Prosecutor NAB, said notice issued to the surety namely Khalid Saifullah under Section 514, Cr.P.C. is vacated. So far the request for return of the surety document, which was furnished by the surety at the time of grant of first pre-arrest bail, is concerned, it appears that surety was furnished by applicant / surety Khalid Saifullah in the shape of Solvency Certificate No.48 dated 16-09-2016 issued by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Naushahro Feroze, at Circuit Court, Hyderabad in terms of the order dated 25-08-2016 because accused Muhammad Saleem Sahito was granted interim pre- arrest bail at Circuit Court, Hyderabad in the sum of Rs.500,000/- (Rupees C. P. No. D – 1195 of 2018 Page 2 of 2 five lac) and P.R. Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Special Prosecutor NAB has recorded his no objection for return of the surety document. In the view of above, application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to send the copy of this order to Circuit Court, Hyderabad for returning the original Solvency Certificate to the applicant after proper identification and verification as per rules. Let the copy of this order be sent to the Mukhtiarkar concerned. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
